text: Assistant: Everything works end to end: server is fully detached (`ppid=1`), no `TENEX_EDGE_*` identity leaked in, and the access log captures method/tool/headers/clientInfo per request. [...] - `mcp-debug.sh log [n]` — the app's own access log (method, tool name, resource URI, `clientInfo`, sanitized headers) at `.../scratchpad/mcp-debug/mcp-server.log`
